## Breaking Changes

## Installation
- Cargo:
  - `cargo install --git https://github.com/JayBytesTech/ai-dev-workflow --tag <tag> aiw`
- Binary:
  - Download the archive for your platform from this release and extract `aiw` (or `aiw.exe`).

## Post-install smoke test
```bash
aiw --version
```
